requirements.title: Actor: admin user
requirements.description: Actor: admin user Acceptance: User can sign in with valid credentials and reach the dashboard. Validation: Invalid username or password should show an error message. Validation: Locked users cannot proceed.
business_rules: Invalid username or password should show an error message.
acceptance_criteria: User can sign in with valid credentials and reach the dashboard.

requirements.title: The system should allow an admin to create a member from the member setup page.
requirements.description: The system should allow an admin to create a member from the member setup page. Actor: admin user Acceptance: Required fields must be validated before save. Acceptance: Successful save should show a success toast and a generated member id. Validation: Duplicate member data should be rejected.
business_rules: Duplicate member data should be rejected.
acceptance_criteria: Required fields must be validated before save.
Successful save should show a success toast and a generated member id.

requirements.title: The login API should return an auth token for valid users.
requirements.description: The login API should return an auth token for valid users. Validation: API should reject malformed payloads. Validation: Response time for login should stay under 2 seconds under moderate load.
business_rules: Response time for login should stay under 2 seconds under moderate load.

requirements.title: Database checks are needed to verify that member creation persists the generated
requirements.description: Database checks are needed to verify that member creation persists the generated member record.
